name: dropdown-menu
description: A keyboard-navigable floating menu (WAI-ARIA APG menu-button pattern) with two modes: array-driven action items, or slotted real-anchor navigation; positioned by @floating-ui/dom with flip + shift.
docs: Register <lv-dropdown-menu> by importing components/ui/dropdown-menu.ts from your entry point. Two modes. ACTION mode: pass `items` as an array of { key, label, icon?, disabled?, separator? } and listen for `lv-select` to receive the activated item key. SLOTTED-NAV mode (app nav / user menu): provide the panel content as light-DOM children (real `<a href>` links, `<hr>` dividers, a logout `<form>`) and optionally a `slot="trigger"` element; the island projects them, applies role=menu/menuitem + roving arrow-key focus, and opens/closes/positions them. Real anchors navigate JS-off; any non-trigger child switches the menu into slotted-nav mode (items is then ignored).
